rationale_en: Subsidized grid connection for irrigation wells is a real but partial rural-electrification and energy-mix lever, one program among many, so no visible break is expected in the irrigated-land, rural-access or per-capita energy series.

Pipeline infrastructure expanded transport capacity for the young oil sector, but output and later employment were driven mainly by concession terms, geology and world price, not this single authorization.
A tariff-schedule amendment is a real, partial revision of the customs duty structure, but as an amendment rather than a full rewrite it is one force among several shaping customs revenue over time.

This bylaw is the operational instrument that classified and cleared state enterprises for transfer, the direct legal trigger for the wave of listings and share transfers that expanded capital markets.

Reassigning SOE ownership is a real structural shift relevant to the investment climate, but ownership reclassification does not mechanically translate into a visible jump in GDP or capital-formation growth.
A single-product mobile-handset duty schedule is too narrow to move economy-wide customs revenue or average tariff-rate series.
Same narrow single-product mobile-phone duty directive captured from a different archive; negligible against aggregate customs and tariff-rate measures.
Same narrow single-product mobile-phone duty directive captured from a different archive; negligible against aggregate customs and tariff-rate measures.
The Annual Budget Law Totals chart is compiled directly from figures enacted in laws like this one; it is the data source, not merely a correlate.

The FY1373 budget set that year's spending and financing envelope during an acute FX and inflation crisis, a real but partial driver of GDP, capital formation and inflation, strongest only for the Expense measures it directly enacts.

A foundational institutional statute for the gas sector belongs to that sector's long regulatory history, but production and flaring outcomes decades later are driven mainly by later instruments, investment and geology, and one bundled series predates the law entirely.
The law underlies the legal basis for gas extraction, but gas rents as a GDP share are set mainly by global gas and oil prices and output levels, not this 1972 institutional statute alone.

The Petroleum Act is the post-revolution framework governing NIOC's production and exploration rights, a major but partial determinant of output and oil rents alongside OPEC quotas, sanctions and reservoir conditions.
As a legal recodification of already-established state oil control, its marginal effect on aggregate GDP growth is real but indirect, one of many forces in the economy's largest sector.
No specific chart or category is targeted; a routine wartime annual budget with no identified measure to test against.
A single wartime year's routine budget is a small force against the whole economy, the standard annual-budget-versus-GDP relationship.
The Fifth Plan directed the entire state investment and industrialization programme of the oil-boom years, a major instrument expected to leave a visible mark on growth and capital-formation series.
No chart or category is named; a generic industrial-policy claim with no identifiable measure to test against.

Like the Fifth Plan, the Fourth Plan directed the state's pre-boom industrialization and investment strategy, a major instrument with an expected visible effect on growth and capital-formation series.
No chart or category is named; a generic industrial-policy claim with no identifiable measure to test against.
D-8 preferential tariffs lower duties with eight partner countries, a real but narrow channel against an applied-tariff average computed across all trading partners and products.
Trade with seven other mid-size D-8 economies is a small slice of Iran's total merchandise trade, dominated by oil exports and a handful of major partners.
A nationwide compensatory cash and food transfer scheme is a direct, named instrument for social-safety-net coverage and adequacy measures, expected to move these specific indicators materially.
The payments cushioned household budgets during the 2018 currency crisis, a real but partial offset against a shock whose scale dwarfed the compensation.

The Justice Shares distribution transferred large blocks of SOE equity to millions of citizens through the exchange, a major instrument expected to visibly lift listed-company counts and market capitalization.
Broad-based but administratively diluted and small in per-capita value, the Gini index is driven far more by inflation and sanctions than by this share-distribution scheme.
This is the core implementing bylaw of the December 2010 price reset, a nationwide administered-price shock that visibly drove the following year's inflation surge.
Sharply raising subsidized fuel and gas prices is a major, direct lever on domestic energy demand, expected to produce a visible consumption response.
Article 6 created the near-universal cash-transfer mechanism that replaced the subsidies, structurally redefining social-safety-net coverage almost overnight.
Subsidy reform was one of several major structural shocks of the era, alongside sanctions and the FX crisis, a real but partial force on aggregate GDP growth.
A secondary, smaller preferential-share mechanism alongside Justice Shares, one of several vehicles feeding stock-market listing and capitalization growth.
Adding a single article to an existing trade bylaw is a narrow procedural amendment with no material effect on aggregate merchandise trade.
A minor bylaw addition touching import and export administration has no meaningful reach into the economy-wide average tariff rate.

This is the named implementing bylaw for knowledge-based-company incentives, but Iran's high-tech export base has stayed structurally small under sanctions, making this single support mechanism a marginal force among many on the export series.
No chart or category is named; a generic claim about industrial value added with no identifiable measure.
A narrow R&D-support bylaw is one of many small structural-reform inputs to national GDP growth, with no expected visible effect on its own.
The enacted FY1342 budget is the direct legal instrument authorizing that year's revenue and spending, a core input to the government-finance series.
One year's routine budget is a small force against national output and general government consumption over the whole Third Plan period.
A bilateral trade framework with a small, war-affected neighboring economy is a negligible channel against Iran's aggregate merchandise trade.
This major amendment to rates, brackets and exemptions in the Direct Taxes Act directly redefines the tax base that the income and profit-tax and tax-revenue series measure.
Direct-tax rules are one standing input among many, including labor law, customs, macro stability and licensing, into a broad qualitative business-climate composite.
The Annual Budget Law Totals chart is compiled directly from figures enacted in laws like this one; it is the primary data source for that year's point.
One year's budget authorization is a small force against national output and general government consumption alongside the oil revenue and sanctions pressure of that year.
A narrow deferred-payment liquidity mechanism for firms buying from state agencies is one of many small tools within the broad business-climate composite.

A named national program for renewing distressed urban housing is a real, direct instrument for housing-stock composition, though overall housing outcomes remain dominated by broader construction-market and macro forces.

Penalizing illegal electricity taps is a real, named lever on transmission and distribution losses, but losses are driven mainly by grid infrastructure and technical factors, making enforcement a partial contributor.
This decree governs internal transaction procedures of one quasi-governmental housing body, an administrative matter with no expected effect on aggregate housing measures.
One of several successive share-pricing bylaws issued across the 2000s privatization wave, individually a marginal, partial contributor to listing and market-cap growth.
A share-pricing mechanic within the broader privatization program is too narrow a lever to expect any visible mark on aggregate GDP or its growth rate.
Another of the successive divestiture-mechanics bylaws of the Article 44 privatization wave, a real but partial contributor alongside several similar rules.

The central energy-efficiency mandate targets exactly these consumption and intensity measures, a real but partial force given that subsidized pricing and industrial structure are the dominant drivers of Iran's energy intensity.
A narrow addition of technical-standard articles reinforces the existing tariff-and-ban protection regime for domestic vehicle production, a marginal incremental piece of that broader framework.
Technical standards for one product category, automobiles, are a small slice of aggregate merchandise imports.
Another in the series of state-share pricing bylaws underpinning Article 44 divestiture, individually a marginal, partial contributor to listing and market-cap trends.
This major amendment to commercial-profit rates and tariff schedules is the explicit legal instrument setting the duty structure that the customs and trade-tax series directly measure.
Tariff and profit-rate changes are a real cost channel for traded goods, but exchange-rate movements, sanctions and oil-driven cycles are the dominant forces on merchandise trade volumes.
A minor trade-facilitation convention for duty-free commercial samples has no meaningful reach into aggregate merchandise trade.
A single-note amendment to the permitted and prohibited goods list is a real but narrow adjustment within a broader post-war trade-policy reshaping, not itself the primary lever.

The flagship follow-through of the White Revolution's land reform belongs centrally to the story of 1970s Iran, but as with the reform itself, no visible break in aggregate GDP is expected from land redistribution alone.
Converting tenant farmers into owners changed rural investment and production incentives, a real, partial driver of crop and cereal output alongside weather, irrigation and price policy.
This law redefined the legal instrument the interest-rate and monetary-sector series measure, replacing conventional interest with profit-and-loss-sharing contracts nationwide.

A foundational banking-system overhaul belongs to any serious account of post-1983 investment, but its effect on aggregate GDP or capital-formation growth is diffuse and indirect, one force among the era's larger war-economy dynamics.
A supplementary wartime budget adjustment is a real but minor, partial input to that year's government-finance figures, smaller in scope than a full annual budget act.
The enacted FY1319 general budget is the direct legal instrument authorizing that year's state revenue and expenditure, a core input to the government-finance series.
The Annual Budget Law Totals chart is compiled directly from figures enacted in laws like this one; it is the primary data source for that year's point.
The enacted FY1371 budget fixes that year's revenue, expenditure, subsidy and borrowing scale, a core direct input to the government-finance series.
One year's budget is a small force against national output and general government consumption over the longer growth trajectory.
The Annual Budget Law Totals chart is compiled directly from figures enacted in laws like this one; it is the primary data source for that year's point.
The enacted FY1378 budget fixes that year's revenue, expenditure, subsidy and borrowing scale, a core direct input to the government-finance series.
One year's budget is a small force against national output and general government consumption over the longer growth trajectory.

This framework law restructured treasury rules and SOE revenue retention, a real structural change to how government-finance figures are measured and scoped going forward, though partial relative to the full range of fiscal instruments.
Changed extra-budgetary revenue retention rules are a real but indirect input into measured government consumption expenditure and GDP composition.
Duplicate capture of the same 2002 financial-regulations framework law; same structural but partial reach into government-finance measurement.
Duplicate capture of the same law; same indirect reach into government consumption expenditure and GDP composition.
The Annual Budget Law Totals chart is compiled directly from figures enacted in laws like this one; it is the primary data source for that year's point.
The enacted FY1377 budget fixes that year's revenue, expenditure, subsidy and borrowing scale, a core direct input to the government-finance series.
One year's budget is a small force against national output and general government consumption over the longer growth trajectory.
A same-year amendment that revises the enacted totals is still a direct correction feeding the Annual Budget Law Totals data series.
A mid-cycle correction to an already-enacted budget is a real but partial adjustment to that year's government-finance figures, not the primary instrument.

This is the foundational post-revolution statute setting which goods may be traded, licensing and prohibited lists, a major instrument structurally shaping the whole trade regime these measures track.
The trade-policy framework is a real but partial force on GDP and trade growth alongside sanctions, oil exports and exchange-rate policy.
A judicial ruling annulling a schedule of port duties and fees is a real, if narrow, change to the cost side of import taxation, one of many components of customs revenue.
Port-fee changes are one of many small frictions affecting import volumes, with no expected visible effect.
The ruling itself is a narrow interpretive clarification of a single budget note, not a change to overall budget totals.
This budget legislated the entire spending of the 1973-74 oil windfall, the single largest fiscal expansion of the late Pahlavi period, a structural break in the government-finance series.
The oil-windfall budget drove the mid-1970s growth surge and overheating, but the oil price shock itself, not the budget alone, was the primary force on GDP.
The enacted FY1317 budget is the direct legal instrument authorizing that year's state revenue and expenditure, a core input to the government-finance series.
The enacted FY1316 budget is the direct legal instrument authorizing that year's state revenue and expenditure, a core input to the government-finance series.
A bilateral and trilateral trade agreement with two small post-Soviet neighbors is a real but modest, partial channel into Iran's trade share with the Europe and Central Asia region specifically.
The enacted, amended FY1343 budget is the direct legal instrument authorizing that year's state revenue and expenditure, a core input to the government-finance series.
One year's budget is a small force against national output and general government consumption over the longer growth trajectory.
The anti-smuggling law targets black-market currency trading, a real but partial lever on the exchange-rate gap; Iran's parallel FX market persisted robustly despite enforcement.
Criminalizing unlicensed goods movement targets flows that by nature sit outside official trade statistics and historically proved resistant to enforcement.
This is the operative valuation bylaw of the Article 44 Supreme Council, a major instrument that materially expanded listed-company counts and market capitalization from 2009 onward.
As a mechanical pricing tool within the broader privatization program, its reach into aggregate GDP or investment growth is real but indirect.
A customs circular merely communicating already-enacted budget-law tariff provisions to customs offices is a procedural transmission step, not a new economic instrument.
The enacted FY1340 budget is the direct legal instrument authorizing that year's state revenue and expenditure, a core input to the government-finance series.
One year's budget is a small force against national output and general government consumption over the longer growth trajectory.

This amendment strengthens the legal regime for licensed logging and grazing building on the 1963 forest nationalization, a real but partial regulatory lever given historically weak enforcement capacity against deforestation.
The enacted FY1352 budget is the direct legal instrument authorizing that year's state revenue and expenditure, a core input to the government-finance series.
